channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Boys Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 63, La Costa Canyon 61
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI- Fantastic hoops game on Wednesday night with Rancho Buena Vista edging La Costa Canyon 63-61.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks the record for most goalies scored on, beating Leevi Merilainen to reach 179
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Alex Ovechkin broke the NHL record for the most goaltenders scored on, beating Leevi Merilainen in overtime to give the Washington Capitals a 1-0 victory over the Ottawa Senators on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Two-time defending champion Sabalenka is into the fourth round at the Australian Open
item.description: It wasn’t often pretty, but two-time defending Australian Open champion Aryna Sabalenka has extended a few impressive streaks while becoming one of the first players to advance to the fourth round of the year’s opening Grand Slam tournament.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: San Diego Clippers Hometown Big Man
item.description: "It's honestly one of the more beautiful full circle moments I could've asked for." said the 6'11" Center Cisse.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Title IX memo throws wrench in plans for schools to pay NIL money directly to athletes
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Plans for colleges to pay athletes directly for their name, image and likeness deals would run afoul of Title IX, the Department of Education said in guidance issued Thursday that adds more confusion to the shifting landscape in college sports.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS and CHEYANNE MUMPHREY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utah HC's youngest player having big impact
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Logan Cooley may only be 20 years old, but it is scary to think where the Utah Hockey Club would be without him this year. Cooley can't even drink legally, and he is second on the team in points with 12 goals and 25 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LeBron James, family forced to evacuate Los Angeles-area home during raging wildfires
item.description: LeBron James of the Los Angeles Lakers told reporters the wildfires in Southern California forced him and his family to evacuate their home last week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: St. Ignatius’ Lenny Vandermade steps down, will coach on Carson Palmer’s staff in SoCal
item.description: Lenny Vandermade, who led St. Ignatius to CCS Open Division title last season, accepts offer to become associate head coach at Santa Margarita of Trinity League.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: J.T. Poston goes 10 under for a 1-shot lead among the usual low scores at The American Express
item.description: LA QUINTA, Calif. (AP) — J.T. Poston shot a 10-under 62 to take a one-stroke lead over Justin Lower in the opening round of The American Express on Thursday. Poston carded nine birdies and an eagle on the Nicklaus Tournament Course at PGA West in the Palm Springs-area desert.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers remains undecided on playing future with his focus on the California wildfires
item.description: Aaron Rodgers' playing future remains undecided, with the New York Jets quarterback focused on the lingering wildfires near his home in Southern California.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Makhachev will try to win record 4th lightweight title defense when he faces Tsarukyan
item.description: Islam Makhachev said he isn't concerned with being known as the greatest lightweight of all time, but does value setting records and earning his way into the UFC Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Reactions to the death of 'Mr. Baseball,' longtime Brewers broadcaster Bob Uecker
item.description: Reactions to the death of longtime Milwaukee Brewers broadcaster Bob Uecker: ___ “It is with heavy hearts that we mourn the passing of Bob. To many, he was an announcer and entertainer whose humor and voice transcended the game, but to us he was so much more.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas star Arch Manning will take reins after Quinn Ewers declares for draft
item.description: Texas Longhorns star quarterback Arch Manning will get the keys to the Lamborghini after Quinn Ewers declared for the NFL Draft earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Learner Tien beats Daniil Medvedev and is the youngest US man in Australia's 3rd round since Sampras
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Learner Tien, a 19-year-old qualifier from California, became the youngest American man to reach the Australian Open's third round since Pete Sampras in 1990, upsetting a racket-tossing Daniil Medvedev 6-3, 7-6 (4), 6-7 (8), 1-6, 7-6 (10-7) in a match that began Thursday
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah Royals have busy offseason with massive roster overhaul
item.description: The Utah Royals have had a busy offseason. There have been departures and additions galore, as the team continues to try to improve before the 2025 NWSL season with the goal of making playoffs for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: LIV Golf will air rounds on FOX Sports platforms starting with 2025 season
item.description: FOX Sports and LIV Golf announced on Thursday that LIV Golf will air the 2025 season on the network with some rounds on FOX Business and FS2.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aggies six-game winning streak ends at UNLV, 65-62
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State basketball team suffered just its second loss of the season Wednesday night, falling at UNLV, 65-62. Tucker Anderson led the Aggies with 19 points, but the Aggies missed its last six shots of the game, and dropped to 16-2 on the season. Dedan Thomas Jr.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UFC champion booted from Frontier flight after being told he couldn't sit in exit row
item.description: Khabib Nurmagomedov suggested that there may have been “racial” or “national” motivations for booting him from the plane — allegations which Frontier has denied.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation

item.title: MLB Players Trust hosts clinic for little leaguers
item.description: The rookies and baseball pros were all smiles during a special clinic to give back to the community and those affected by last year's hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Brew, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jack Sawyer had the kind of moment that will live on long past his playing days with Ohio State. Of course, one more victory would make it that much sweeter.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Expect road closures in Santee for 2025 USATF National Race Walk Championships
item.description: The City of Santee is hosting the 2025 USATF National Race Walk Championships this weekend, and several road closures will be in place Sunday morning into the early afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5
